# PERF-040-per-func positive: repeated time.Now in the same function still fires
lang: go
file: PERF-040-per-func-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Stamp(c *gin.Context) {
	start := time.Now()
	_ = start
	end := time.Now()
	_ = end
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
